target.label: Total Intelligence (IST 2000-R composite)
target.description: Total intelligence score from the Intelligence Structure Test 2000-R.

predictors.label: Age
predictors.description: Age of participant in years.

predictors.label: Biological sex
predictors.description: Self-reported biological sex (male/female).

predictors.label: Handedness
predictors.description: Left- or right-handed.

predictors.label: Body mass index
predictors.description: Body mass index (kg/m^2). Zero values are data errors and treated as missing.

predictors.label: Education level
predictors.description: Highest completed education level (CBS classification): low/medium/high.

predictors.label: Background socio-economic status
predictors.description: Background SES from parental income and education (range 2-6).

predictors.label: Neuroticism (NEO-FFI)
predictors.description: NEO-FFI Neuroticism scale (sum of items).

predictors.label: Extraversion (NEO-FFI)
predictors.description: NEO-FFI Extraversion scale (sum of items).

predictors.label: Openness (NEO-FFI)
predictors.description: NEO-FFI Openness to experience scale (sum of items).

predictors.label: Agreeableness (NEO-FFI)
predictors.description: NEO-FFI Agreeableness scale (sum of items).

predictors.label: Conscientiousness (NEO-FFI)
predictors.description: NEO-FFI Conscientiousness scale (sum of items).

predictors.label: BAS drive
predictors.description: Behavioural Activation System drive subscale.

predictors.label: BAS fun-seeking
predictors.description: Behavioural Activation System fun-seeking subscale.

predictors.label: BAS reward responsiveness
predictors.description: Behavioural Activation System reward responsiveness subscale.

predictors.label: Behavioural inhibition (BIS)
predictors.description: Behavioural Inhibition System scale.

predictors.label: Trait anxiety (STAI-T)
predictors.description: State-Trait Anxiety Inventory, trait subscale.

predictors.label: Sexual attraction to males
predictors.description: Degree of sexual attraction to males (1-7).

predictors.label: Sexual attraction to females
predictors.description: Degree of sexual attraction to females (1-7).

predictors.label: Gender identity (male)
predictors.description: Degree to which the subject felt male (1-7).

predictors.label: Gender identity (female)
predictors.description: Degree to which the subject felt female (1-7).

predictors.label: Religious upbringing
predictors.description: Whether the subject had a religious upbringing (yes/no).

predictors.label: Currently religious
predictors.description: Whether the subject is religious now (yes/no).

predictors.label: Importance of religion
predictors.description: How much religion plays a role in the subject's life (1-5).
